title: September 25th, 2020 (2)
body:
- daily notes
    - akabilly
    - professional
        - cover [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] #roam/templates
            - name of the project being covered
                - commission
                    -
                - design
                    -
                - create
                    -
                - concept
                    -
                - produce
        - everything broke album concept
        - music production tasks
            - consulting producers
            - rush - ask him to listen to the album and talk to me about it
            - matt norton - ask him to find a song he'd like to do an alternate mix or remix of
            - bjorn vader (cameron) - find a song for him to flex on a bridge or finish
            - naeem - ask him what he's excited about musically, conceptually, etc. if there is anything, and it fits, ask him if he has any suggestions. if he does, see if he wants to do that
            - build list of early listeners (will c, matt tabak, mark
            - executive producer
            - dan - follow up at scheduled time
        - soundcloud tasks
            - add selected instrumental tracks from 2020 playlist
            - rename tracks
            - include date of initial creation
            - reconsider working titles in light of new context
            - rearrange playlist by date
            - add [[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] to each track
            - explorative - try things out while it's cheap
            - demonstrative - it's meaning should reveal itself
            - affective - ultimately it's about the impact
            - creative - it must give away something of me and mine
            - iterative - synthesize the fruits of past attempts and make something new
            - add lyrics to desert life
            - review editable info for each track and systematize
            - lyrics
            - meta
            - tags
    - professional
